meta_title: For Founders: design with AI to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Design with AI to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no portfolio. An intermediate-level guide for founders using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster.
content.answer_block: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap by building high-fidelity, functional AI-driven micro-SaaS prototypes. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid UI generation and Claude Code for backend orchestration, you can transform abstract concepts into production-ready assets, proving your technical execution capabilities and securing your first paying customers in record time.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. For a founder, a lack of portfolio isn't just a lack of history—it is a barrier to trust that keeps you from your first revenue milestone. You are stuck in a cycle of 'needs experience to get clients, needs clients to get experience,' while your competitors are already shipping.

But the rules of the game have shifted. With the stack of Antigravity and Claude Code, design is no longer a bottleneck; it is an automated asset. We are moving beyond wireframes into high-fidelity, functional execution that speaks louder than any resume ever could.

steps.title: Define the High-Value Micro-SaaS
steps.description: Identify a specific, painful problem in a niche market. We focus on a functional prototype, not a generic landing page.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a clean, modern SaaS landing page for a B2B productivity tool. Include a hero section with a clear value proposition, a feature grid, and a pricing table. Use a high-contrast, professional color palette.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --context 'Create a project structure for a Next.js 14 app with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion.'

steps.title: Generate UI Components with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the core UI components that demonstrate technical proficiency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive dashboard layout component. Include a sidebar navigation, a top header with user profile, and a main content area using Lucide icons.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Integrate the generated sidebar and header components into the layouts folder.'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Backend Logic
steps.description: Connect your frontend to a mock API to demonstrate functional logic, vital for showing off 'builder' skills.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a TypeScript interface for a SaaS subscription plan and a mock service that returns a list of active users.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a server-side action to handle user data simulation and export it to the dashboard component.'

steps.title: Stress-Test with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to audit your implementation and ensure it follows production-grade clean code standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current dashboard component to use memoization for performance optimization.
steps.claude_code_command: claude audit --fix 'Review the entire project for performance bottlenecks and security vulnerabilities.'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Deploy your prototype to a live URL to showcase your work as a living portfolio piece.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment-ready configuration file for Vercel including environment variable placeholders.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Verify build process and generate a deployment summary for README.md.'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Technical Debt' section in your README; it shows you understand long-term maintenance better than a junior developer.
Use AI to generate synthetic data for your dashboard; a populated screen is 10x more impressive than an empty one.
Focus on one 'hero' feature that solves a specific pain point rather than building a bloated, feature-rich app.
Treat your GitHub commit history as a product narrative; write descriptive commits that explain the 'why' behind the code.
Add a 'Built with AI' technical breakdown in your portfolio to highlight your ability to leverage modern automation tools.
content.next_steps: Once your prototype is live, reach out to three potential users in your target niche for feedback. Use their feedback to iterate the product. This turns a static portfolio piece into a living business validation loop.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for permission to be a founder. Your ability to build and deploy is your new resume. The tools are ready, the market is waiting, and your first sale is just one deployment away. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
